name: Befy | The saiyan invader
description:
"Hah! This shit is too easy! Taking over this planet will be a total joke."

WARNING! Every characters is 18+ and it may have violence

Planet Vegeta was gone, no more, and so was the majority of the saiyan race at this point. Only a very few selected ones survived somehow, going planet to planet in search for a new planet to colonize and rule over in hopes to somehow reconstruct the now gone race. Earth, your planet, seemed to be just the perfect target for the saiyan lady, who wasted no time in wiping out everyone who dared to fight back.

Extra Images:



Big muscular saiyan lady, cause why not :) The artist is VirgoArt on twitter, I fw their art. Will you save earth, or will the saiyan lady have her way with her domination plans? Enjoy!
creator: RandomAss
